trans-unit.source: Provide a relative path inside files/, for example exports/orders.
trans-unit.target: Provide a relative path inside files/, for example exports/orders.

trans-unit.source: Use the attachment token ##nc_file_voucher## on a mailer message in the same notification to attach the current CSV file. The file message must be sorted before the mailer message.
trans-unit.target: Use the attachment token ##nc_file_voucher## on a mailer message in the same notification to attach the current CSV file. The file message must be sorted before the mailer message.
